remember: Students will be able to recall the geographical features and the Mughal Empire's expansion across three continents.
Students will be able to list out the major rulers of the Mughal Empire and their contributions.
Students will be able to identify the key events and dates in the history of the Mughal Empire.
understand: Students will be able to explain the importance of the Mughal Empire in Indian history.
Students will be able to describe the impact of the Mughal Empire on Indian society and culture.
Students will be able to analyze the reasons behind the rise and fall of the Mughal Empire.
apply: Students will be able to apply historical concepts to understand the Mughal Empire's expansion and impact.
Students will be able to use historical data to compare the Mughal Empire with other empires in Indian history.
Students will be able to evaluate the role of key individuals in shaping the Mughal Empire's history.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the social and economic structures of the Mughal Empire.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of the Mughal Empire on regional and global politics.
Students will be able to compare the Mughal Empire with other empires in terms of their expansion and impact.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to understand the geographical features of the Mughal Empire and its expansion across three continents.
Students will be able to explain the importance of the Mughal Empire in Indian history and its impact on Indian society and culture.
Students will be able to describe the rise and fall of the Mughal Empire and the reasons behind it.
board_exam_objectives: CBSE tests students' understanding of the Mughal Empire's expansion and impact on Indian history.
Students need to analyze the social and economic structures of the Mughal Empire and evaluate its impact on regional and global politics.
Students need to compare the Mughal Empire with other empires in terms of their expansion and impact.
